overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Uttarakhand.

rules.title: Review Uttarakhand Shops and Commercial Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Uttarakhand Shops and Commercial Establishments Act is applicable.

citations.reference: Uttarakhand Shops and Commercial Establishments Act

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, wage records, attendance records and prescribed notices under Uttarakhand labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and employee information required under Uttarakhand labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Uttarakhand provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave, holidays and weekly offs.

citations.reference: Uttarakhand Shops and Commercial Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the Uttarakhand Labour Welfare Fund, where applicable.

rules.title: Review Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest minimum wage notifications applicable in Uttarakhand.

citations.reference: Government of Uttarakhand Minimum Wage Notifications

rules.title: Monitor Uttarakhand Labour Notifications
rules.description: Review labour department notifications, amendments, exemptions and compliance circulars issued by the Government of Uttarakhand.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering statutory registrations, labour welfare, payroll compliance and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for statutory filings, licence renewals, inspections and labour compliance due dates.
